description: Resolve Bolt inventory targets from the OpenVox GUI ENC database

group.description: Optional: only return targets from this ENC group

ssl_verify.description: Verify SSL certificates when calling the API

api_token.description: Raw API token to authenticate with the OpenVox GUI

token_file.description: Path to a file containing the API token (defaults to /etc/puppetlabs/bolt/.bolt_token)

run_as.description: User to run commands as on targets (defaults to 'root' for privileged GUI operations)

run_as_command.description: Command used to change user (e.g. ['sudo'] or ['sudo', '-E']). Defaults to ['sudo']
